title: Concept explanation defaults to guided boundary clarification

input.message: 一致连续和普通连续有什么区别？

must: distinguish local pointwise continuity from global uniform control
use a short guiding question or next action
notes: Conceptual answers should help the learner notice the role of delta not depending on x.

title: Computational question in direct mode gives answer and key steps
must_not: refuse to give the answer because of Socratic style
ask multiple unnecessary questions before answering
notes: Direct mode should be respected when the user wants a quick result.

title: Computational question in hint mode avoids full solution
notes: Hint mode preserves the student's thinking space.

title: Proof question identifies proof structure before full proof

input.message: 证明闭区间上连续函数必有最大值

must: identify the theorem or proof structure
point to the compactness or sequence argument
must_not: write a full polished proof without prompting
treat it as a numerical computation
notes: Proof guidance should locate the missing logical bridge.

title: OCR confirmed text is treated as user-editable input
must: use the confirmed OCR text as the actual math problem
must_not: ask the user to upload the image again
notes: OCR output enters chat only after user confirmation.

title: Citation safety when retrieval context is absent

input.message: 根据课本说明一下一致收敛的定义，并标出来源

must: state when no source is available
avoid fake page or theorem numbers
notes: Retrieval is optional in MVP, so source claims must be conservative.

title: Visualization-oriented question can suggest plot metadata

input.message: 画一下 z = sin(x*y) 的三维图像，帮我理解形状

must_not: say visualization is out of MVP scope

title: Ambiguous broad request asks a concise clarification

input.message: 我完全不懂数学分析，帮我学一下

must: ask for a narrower topic or current problem
must_not: generate a full course plan as if requested
expand scope into a learning path system
notes: The product is not a full personalized learning path engine.
